studies.title: Effectiveness of the digital health application sinCephalea in theprophylaxis of migraine days in patients with episodic migrainesover a period of twelve weeks

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital health application sinCephalea, as evidenced by the title and detailed description in the trial registration. The intervention involves the use of the sinCephalea app with dietary recommendations for migraine prophylaxis.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a 'randomized, open, against standard treatment controlled study' with participants being 'randomized' to an intervention group and a control group. This indicates an interventional, experimental design with random allocation, characteristic of an RCT.
